nasb.text: But when they saw Him walking on the sea, they supposed that it was a ghost, and cried out;

esv.text: but when they saw him walking on the sea they thought it was a ghost, and cried out,

cnv.text: 門徒看見他在海面上走，以為是鬼怪，就喊叫起來；

ccb.text: 门徒看见有人在湖面上走，以为是幽灵，吓得惊叫起来。

csbs.text: 门徒们看见耶稣在湖面上行走，以为是幽灵，于是喊叫起来，
